title: Speaking - Part 2
description: Look at the photograph and say what you can see.

tasks.instructions: Here is your photograph. It shows people going bowling. Please tell us what you can see in the photograph.

images.label: A
images.description: Three friends are at a bowling alley. One girl is holding a bowling ball and getting ready to play while the others are sitting and watching. There are bowling lanes, shoes and a screen in the background.

followUp.question: Talk about the people. Talk about the place. Talk about other things in the photograph.

tasks.instructions: Here is your photograph. It shows someone having an eye test. Please tell us what you can see in the photograph.

images.label: B
images.description: A young boy is having an eye test at an optician's. He is sitting in a chair and looking at a letter chart while the optician stands beside him. There are glasses and equipment in the room.

followUp.question: Talk about the people. Talk about the place. Talk about other things in the photograph.
